pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh script both specify this filename
Task description states 'Land: x + y ≤ 240'; Verified by linear programming solver
Task description states 'Water: 2x + y ≤ 400'; Verified by linear programming solver
Task description states 'Labor: x + 3y ≤ 480'; Verified by linear programming solver
Computed by finding all feasible intersection points of constraint boundaries using linear algebra; scipy.optimize.linprog verified feasibility
scipy.optimize.linprog solver; Manual verification: P = 250(160) + 200(80) = 40000 + 16000 = 56000 is maximum among all corner points
Linear programming solution: P = 250x + 200y = 250(160) + 200(80) = 56000; Verified by scipy.optimize.linprog

privileged_info_summary: This task presents a synthetic educational linear programming problem for teaching crop optimization. The problem maximizes profit P = 250x + 200y subject to three constraints (land, water, labor). All metadata values are mathematically verified: the three constraints (x+y≤240, 2x+y≤400, x+3y≤480) correctly define the feasible region with five corner points: (0,0), (200,0), (160,80), (120,120), (0,160). The optimal solution (160,80) yields maximum profit of $56,000, verified through linear programming optimization.
